description: Provides quality control metrics on raw sequence data
author: Marc-Danie Nazaire, Broad Institute
plan:
## FastQC GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
FastQC is a GenePattern module that Provides quality control metrics on raw sequence data

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 5 parameters:
- Required: input.file, kmer.size, extract.output
- Optional: input.format, contaminant.file

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>sam-1.32.jar<path.separator><libdir>jbzip2-0.9.jar<path.separator><libdir>fastqc-0.10.1.jar<path.separator><libdir>fastqc-wrapper.jar<path.separator><libdir> -Dfastqc.output_dir\=./ -Dfastqc.unzip\=<extract.output> -Dfastqc.kmer_size\=<kmer.size> -Dfastqc.contaminant_file\=<contaminant.file> -Dfastqc.quiet\=true org.genepattern.modules.FastQCWrapper <input.file>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input.file
parameters.description: RNA-seq reads file in FASTQ (bz2 and gz compressed files are supported), SAM, or BAM format.

parameters.name: input.format
parameters.description: Bypasses the normal sequence file format detection and forces the program to use the specified format.

parameters.name: contaminant.file
parameters.description: FastQC screens overrepresented sequences (> 0.1% of total) against a set of possible contaminants consisting of all the primers and adapters used by the various sequencing platforms.  The "Overrepresented sequences" report generated by FastQC will indicate when an overrepresented sequence corresponds to a known contaminant.  This optional contaminant file provides a means of adding more sequences to FastQC's built-in list of known contaminants. See module documentation for a description and example of this file's format.

parameters.name: kmer.size
parameters.description: The length of Kmer to look for in the Kmer content module. The specified Kmer length must be between 2 and 10. Default length is 5.

parameters.name: extract.output
parameters.description: Whether to output an uncompressed version of the report. Set this to yes to view the report directly from within GenePattern.
